MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Attorney Richard Nelson (Millar & Associates, 415.981.8100) appearing for plaintiffs.
No other appearances on this matter.

RULING: Attorney James M. Millar's motion to be relieved as counsel of record for plaintiffs is granted on the condition that counsel must either obtain a continuance of the September 24, 2007 Order To Show Cause hearing if the client chooses or appear at the hearing on behalf of the client. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR #11312 =301/PJB
